The tech industry has a cargo cult problem. Big companies hire dozens of engineers on a single feature? Smaller startups do the same. FAANG runs microservices at scale? A 5-person team spins up Kubernetes.

Most copying is cargo cult. You don't have their constraints, their traffic, their org debt.
